# GitHub Copilot — read Cursor rules in this repo

Canonical **instructions** live in **`.cursor/rules/`** (used by Cursor; safe for humans and other agents to read too):

- **`.cursor/rules/gpxmapper-core.mdc`** — tooling, layout, architecture, workflow
- **`.cursor/rules/python-standards.mdc`** — Python / SOLID / gpxmapper patterns
- **`.cursor/rules/git-github-workflow.mdc`** — commits, branches, PRs

**`AGENTS.md`** and **`.github/git-commit-instructions.md`** at the repo root only point to these files.

For install, CLI, and troubleshooting, use **README.md** and **docs/**.
